name: Backdoor IAM Role Trust Policy
description: Simulates an attacker modifying an existing IAM role's trust policy to add an external account (193672423079) as a trusted principal, enabling them to assume the role from outside the AWS organization.
prerequisites: IAM role with an existing trust policy (stratus-red-team-backdoor-role-target)
detection_signal: iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy with an external account principal added to an existing role's trust policy
